_comment: AUTO-GENERATED search index. Do not manually edit. Regenerate by running the search index generator script after content updates.

entry_fields.title: string — display title
entry_fields.body: string — searchable text content (stripped of markdown)
entry_fields.tags: string[] — topic tags for faceted search
entry_fields.moduleId: string | null — parent module ID (for sections, glossary)
entry_fields.examSetId: string | null — parent exam set ID (for questions)
entry_fields.sectionId: string | null — parent section ID (for glossary, visuals)
entry_fields.surface: number[] — which surfaces this entry targets (e.g., [9, 10, 14])
entry_fields.weight: number — search relevance weight (1.0 = normal, 2.0 = high-yield)
